Professional Introduction.subject: Introduction — {{company}} Partnership Opportunity
Professional Introduction.body:
Hello {{first_name}},

I hope this message finds you well. My name is [Your Name], and I'm reaching out from [Your Company].

I came across {{company}} and was impressed by your work. I believe there's a great opportunity for us to collaborate.

Would you be open to a brief conversation this week?

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Follow-Up.subject: Following Up — {{first_name}}, quick question
Follow-Up.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I wanted to follow up on my previous message. I understand you're busy, so I'll keep this brief.

I'd love to connect for just 15 minutes to discuss how we might work together.

Would any time this week work for you?

Thanks,
[Your Name]

Partnership Proposal.subject: Partnership Proposal for {{company}}
Partnership Proposal.body:
Dear {{first_name}},

I'm writing to propose a strategic partnership between our organizations.

After researching {{company}}, I believe combining our strengths could create significant value for both parties.

I've prepared a brief overview of the partnership and would welcome the opportunity to discuss it further.

Warm regards,
[Your Name]

Service Offering.subject: How We Can Help {{company}} Grow
Service Offering.body:
Hello {{first_name}},

Are you looking to [achieve specific goal]? We've helped companies like {{company}} achieve remarkable results.

Here's what we offer:

  • Benefit 1 — Description
  • Benefit 2 — Description
  • Benefit 3 — Description

I'd love to show you how we can help. Shall we schedule a demo?

Best,
[Your Name]

Event Invitation.subject: You're Invited — Exclusive Event for {{company}}
Event Invitation.body:
Dear {{first_name}},

We're hosting an exclusive event that I think would be incredibly valuable for you and the {{company}} team.

Event Details:

📅 Date: [Date]
🕐 Time: [Time]
📍 Location: [Location/Online]

Spots are limited. Would you like me to reserve a seat for you?

Looking forward to seeing you there!
[Your Name]
